title: Player HP Display
description: A simple mod that shows the nickname and HP of the player you're looking at  requires Fabric API.
body:
**Player Health Viewer**

*Requires Fabric API. The mod works on servers such as minestar.pl, rapy.gg, sigmamc.club, and many more.*

This mod adds a simple and convenient system for viewing information about other players. When you aim your cursor at a player, a special GUI appears on the screen showing their nickname and current amount of health points (HP).

This allows you to quickly check the health status of other players without using commands. The information is displayed in a clean interface that appears automatically when you point your crosshair at a player.

**Mod Features:**

* Displays the player's nickname when you aim at them
* GUI with an HP bar or hearts
* Quick health checking for other players
* Lightweight and easy to use
* Useful on PvP, RPG, and survival servers
